candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows 100% conviction SHORT but green_matches=0, treat the historical hit_rate as unanchored and cut size — high live conviction without a single historical green match is pattern-novelty, not pattern-confirmation.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: green_matches counts how many times this exact live-indicator configuration mapped to a profitable historical outcome. When conv=100% but green_matches=0, the system is extrapolating a clean directional read it has never actually seen pay off. Institutions are not fading anything here — the live bears are real, but the system has no out-of-sample anchor that this specific bear cluster resolves favorably, so the 67%/66%/72% hist_hr is borrowed from looser analogues, not this signature. NFP morning (days_until=0) amplifies the risk: high-impact prints break the indicator-to-outcome mapping that the hist_hr was estimated on.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.99 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.5; if news_high_impact_days_until == 0: veto_new_entries == True
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Drawdown reduction and Sharpe +0.02-0.04 by suppressing over-sized entries on unconfirmed 100%-conviction signals; avoids the variance spike of trading novel signatures into NFP.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: All five pairs report green_matches=0 today while GBPUSD/EURUSD/AUDUSD show conv=100% SHORT with hist_hr 66-72%, and USDJPY shows conv=100% LONG with hist_hr=0% — the hist_hr is decoupled from any actual matching green configuration. Zero trades in last 7 days means no live confirmation either.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightened the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 assuming a bull-market safe-haven dynamic; today's briefing flags GEOPOLITICS-dominated de-risking with USDJPY consensus LONG at hist_hr=0% — if the carry-corruption regime has shifted, the fixed 13 threshold may need re-validation against the current rate-signal decoupling.

reflection.system_health_note: System is correctly inactive (0 trades/7 days) into an NFP print with UNKNOWN regime, TV providing no signals, and every consensus signal showing green_matches=0 — a healthy freeze, not a malfunction.
